---
title: "Elizabeth Catharine Yonge"
---

## Elizabeth Catharine Yonge

**Dates:** (1847/8-1905)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society, cousin of CMY

### Biography

A Gosling as ‘Cricket’  1865-after 1869, she was daughter of the Rev. John Eyre Yonge, master at Eton, who was CMY’s first cousin.  Charlotte Fortescue Yonge was her sister.

### Letters

- Letter from  Novr 9th 1872
- Letter from May 31 st [1870] 
- Letter from May 9th [1870] 
- Letter from March 2 [1870]
- Letter from Jany 28th  [1870]
- Letter from [March 1869]
- Letter from May 25 th [1867]
- Letter from Decr 22d [1865]	
- Letter from Oct 30th [1865]
- Letter from Febry 3d [1865]
- Letter from Jany 23d 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
